evals.prompt: 帮我审核一下这篇论文的主要贡献和创新点，以及实验是否和baseline做了充分对比。
evals.expected_output: 应该生成完整的论文内容审核报告，包含贡献声明列表、创新性分析、baseline对比、实验完整性评估
assertions: Output contains main contributions section (主要贡献)
Output contains method innovation analysis (方法创新性)
Output contains baseline comparison section (Baseline对比)
Output contains experimental completeness section (实验完整性)
Report is structured as markdown with tables
